summary: Tested Ikas-Txiki Manager backend (29 pytest tests, all passing) and frontend (full UI navigation, language toggle, CRUD flows for Teams, Players, Matches, Payments, Authorizations, Settings, Callups). All core flows functional.

design_issues.screen: All dialogs with dates (Players, Matches, Authorizations, Payments)
issues: Using browser native HTML5 date input (mm/dd/yyyy format) instead of shadcn Calendar component - poor UX, inconsistent across browsers, format confusing for Spanish/Basque locale users who expect dd/mm/yyyy
EmptyState 'Nuevo jugador' button has no data-testid (header `add-player-btn` does have one). Add data-testid='add-player-btn-empty' or share testid for testability.

action_items: (Design polish) Replace native HTML5 date inputs with shadcn Calendar/Popover component for date pickers across PlayerDialog, Matches, Authorizations, Payments to standardize UX and respect locale (dd/mm/yyyy).
(Minor) Add data-testid to EmptyState 'Nuevo X' buttons for tests.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: update_doc passes data through `data = {k: v for k, v in data.items() if v is not None or k in data}` which is a no-op (the `or k in data` is always true). Either drop the comprehension or actually filter Nones. Currently full Pydantic-defaults overwrite fields on partial updates - PUT effectively requires complete payloads (matches Player Pydantic model with required `nombre`). OK for now since frontend sends full payloads.

server.py compute_category: uses today.year - bd.year (calendar age, not season year). The code computes `season_year = today.year if today.month >= 7 else today.year - 1` then `age = season_year - bd.year`. This works but does not match the strict Spanish football federation rule of age reached during the calendar year of the season-end. Acceptable approximation.
server.py: PUT /players sends Pydantic Player which requires `nombre`. If frontend ever sends a partial update without `nombre`, request will 422.
Players.jsx empty-state action button lacks data-testid (testability gap).
All date inputs use <Input type='date'> (native), not shadcn Calendar - violates design system consistency.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (Dashboard, nav, ES/EU toggle, Teams create, Players create with auto-category, Matches create, Payments auto importe_final, Authorizations create, Settings save, Callups dialog renders)

seed_data_creation: Tests create and clean up TEST_-prefixed data per run (teams, families, players, matches, callups, payments, authorizations). One auth row may remain visible from UI exploratory test (not auto-cleaned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py - run with `pytest -n 0` (the addopts in /app/backend/pytest.ini use xdist loadscope which splits the module-scoped fixture across workers and breaks the shared created_ids state). Use -n 0 for serial run. All API endpoints under /api work correctly. data-testid map: add-player-btn / player-nombre / player-apellidos / player-fecha-nacimiento / player-save-btn ; add-team-btn / team-nombre / team-save-btn ; add-match-btn / match-rival / match-fecha / match-save-btn ; add-payment-btn / payment-base / payment-descuento / payment-save-btn (NOTE: NOT payment-importe-base) ; add-auth-btn / auth-firmante / auth-save-btn ; add-callup-btn / callup-match / callup-save-btn ; save-settings-btn ; sidebar-nav-{dashboard|players|families|teams|matches|callups|payments|authorizations|settings} ; lang-es / lang-eu.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs to RCA. Tests succeed against live preview backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
